acquisition method: The mass spectrometer was operated in DDA positive ion mode
collision energy: peptides were fragmented with fixed HCD as activation type at 28% HCD Collision Energy
enrichment method: T. gondii mitoribosomes were purified through immuno-precipitation
fragmentation method: peptides were fragmented with fixed HCD as activation type
instrument: A portion of the digested peptides were analysed by LC-MS... on a Fusion Lumos Mass Spectrometer
